race.comment: MASTER HAKU (4) has been absent for five months. Looked a nice prospect in the two starts he did make the track with the best of those being a head second at Cork. Expected to be fit for return and holds leading claims amongst this field. ENDLESS TALKING (2) shaped well when 4.5L fourth at Limerick. Remains unexposed and there should be plenty more to come yet. Keep safe. THE STORE BOY (8) has shown ability on all starts so far. Fell in a chase last time but switch back to hurdles can help. Shortlist. LAMIKAL D'AIRY (3) impressed when wining a point and is very much of interest now racing under rules. Expected to prove a threat to all.
